disclaimer: Operational observations only. Nothing on this page constitutes investment advice, a trading recommendation, or a securities opinion. Surprise probabilities reflect estimated likelihood of material deviation from analyst consensus on operational metrics — they are not price targets, fair value estimates, or buy/sell/hold signals.

assumptions.name: Non-SiPho specialty foundry base
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: X-FAB flags continued automotive inventory corrections and limited short-term visibility. Specialty foundry recovery uneven across peers. Tower guidance linearly extrapolates a base that peer data suggests is more inhomogeneous.

entries.subject: STMicroelectronics N.V.

stage2.note: Revenue beat of +1.5% vs consensus ($3,095M vs $3,050M). At 50% surprise probability and 'noise' label, the marginal beat is consistent with calibrated uncertainty. Non-GAAP diluted EPS $0.13. No methodology change warranted.

assumptions.name: Automotive/P&D stabilisation
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: EU car registrations -3.9% YoY in January, -1.2% YoY YTD February. Infineon remains cautious on automotive. ST started from a weaker base than peers, with P&D -31.6% YoY in Q4.
assumptions.miss_reason: Revenue threshold met ($389M >= $380M) despite continued operational weakness. P&D operating loss deepened from -$28M to -$84M YoY, confirming directional concern but not the revenue-based testable question.

lessons_learned: P&D segment revenue threshold was met despite severe operational deterioration (operating loss -$84M vs -$28M YoY). Revenue-based testable questions can miss profitability erosion — noted as observation, no methodology change.

Skalierungslogik confirmed: P&D at 12.4% segment share correctly scaled mismatch to ~2.5pp at group level, which did not produce a group-level signal. AM&S (+23.2% YoY) and EMP (+31.3% YoY) overcompensated.
50% probability / 'noise' label produced Brier component of 0.25 — neutral, no calibration damage. Correct restraint.

score_summary.stage2_note: Segment share 12.4% scales -20pp P&D mismatch down to -2.5pp at group level. Blind spot is real but mechanically too small to produce a group-level signal.

assumptions.name: Power Solutions demand trajectory
assumptions.testable_question: Q1 order intake >= EUR 3.9B (at least Q1/2025 level)?
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: US policy/tariff uncertainty, offshore FID weakness, 2025 order intake already declining YoY with falling ASP.

assumptions.name: Geopolitical/tariff stability for margins
assumptions.testable_question: Q1 Group EBIT margin before special items >= 6.0%?
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: Report explicitly names tariffs, trade barriers, sanctions as margin risk. Management assumes no significant deterioration — a high stability bar.

assumptions.name: Grid/permitting conversion stability
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: Outlook names lack of grid connections as risk. Revenue recognition only at control transfer. Market design and permitting remain bottlenecks.

assumptions.name: Service segment weather/FX resilience
assumptions.testable_question: Q1 Service EBIT margin before special items >= 15.5%?

overlap_clusters.shared_driver: Deterioration of external business conditions — policy/tariff uncertainty, permitting/grid frictions, and resulting delays in orders, handover, and margins.

assumptions.name: Trade/tariff friction on gross profit
assumptions.testable_question: Q1/2026 gross profit dollar growth >= 28% YoY?
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: De-minimis duty-free suspension continued Feb 2026. Cross-border friction rising for smaller merchants. Shopify names trade measures including tariffs as explicit risk factor.

entries.subject: GE Vernova Inc.

stage2.note: GAAP EPS of $17.44 includes $3.99B pre-tax gain from Prolec GE remeasurement and $330M from Proficy divestiture (non-operating, non-recurring). Adjusted EPS reconstructed from Adjusted EBITDA of $896M, D&A of $341M, non-operating benefit income of $134M, and 272M diluted shares yields approximately $1.97–$2.16 depending on effective tax rate assumption (midpoint ~$2.06). Beat of roughly 15% vs $1.79 consensus. Self-labeled 'noise' at 45% probability — system correctly refrained from claiming a strong signal.

assumptions.name: Gas Power demand trajectory
assumptions.condition_met_note: Below threshold by $29M (0.6%) — de minimis deviation, materially aligned with 'no mismatch' call.

assumptions.name: Wind segment loss trajectory
assumptions.testable_question: Wind segment EBITDA better than -$150M in Q1?
assumptions.mismatch_drivers: BOEM suspended Vineyard Wind, Revolution Wind, Sunrise Wind. Weak onshore orders from US policy uncertainty. Tariff impact $300-400M guided for full year.
assumptions.magnitude_note: Actual result $232M worse than threshold and $218M worse than guided full-year Wind loss of roughly -$400M after just one quarter — deterioration substantially more severe than anticipated.

lessons_learned: Stage 1 correctly resolved all three assumption calls — two aligned (Power marginally below threshold but de minimis; Electrification clearly above), one material mismatch (Wind) confirmed with severity exceeding expectation.
Wind mismatch validates the Tetlock-style edge-seeking approach: the analysis identified a blind spot in consensus guidance and was directionally correct with meaningful magnitude.

Stage 2 miss on direction was correctly self-labeled 'noise' at 45% probability — confidence calibration held. The Prolec-GE remeasurement gain of $3.99B was a bookkeeping event not foreseeable at analysis time and does not materially affect Adjusted EPS comparison.

GAAP vs. Adjusted EPS distinction is critical for resolution: headline GAAP of $17.44 would falsely suggest a 874% beat; reconstructed Adjusted EPS of ~$2.00 shows a more modest 10–20% beat vs consensus.

entries.subject: ASML Holding NV

assumptions.name: Export control risk
assumptions.miss_reason: MATCH Act appeared April 2026, after quarter-end March 29. Driver had no mechanical impact on Q1 numbers.

lessons_learned: Generic cycle skepticism against a well-understood mega-trend (AI/EUV) rarely constitutes a genuine edge.
Timing mismatch between driver appearance and quarter-end is a fixable methodological error — now addressed by driver_timing field.
Two correct aligned-calls (IR-ASML-01, IR-ASML-02) confirm guidance robustness and have real value.
